nilReturn.title: File Nil Return
nilReturn.warningText: Filing a nil return declares zero taxable supply, zero input tax credit, and zero tax liability for this period. Ensure this is accurate.
nilReturn.implies1: No sales or purchases were made in this period.
nilReturn.implies2: No ITC is available or claimed.
nilReturn.implies3: Tax liability is nil for this return period.
nilReturn.ackText: I confirm that I have no taxable outward supplies, inward supplies, or tax liability for this period and wish to file a nil return.
nilReturn.confirmBody: Are you sure you want to file a nil return? This cannot be undone.

sync.hint: Pulls inward invoices from GSTN. Your existing decisions are kept.
sync.rateLimited: Too many sync attempts. Try again in a minute.

banner.actionRequired_one: Action required by {{date}}. {{count}} invoice still pending. Anything not actioned will be automatically accepted when GSTR-2B is generated on the 14th.
banner.actionRequired_other: Action required by {{date}}. {{count}} invoices still pending. Anything not actioned will be automatically accepted when GSTR-2B is generated on the 14th.
banner.windowPast: GSTR-2B for {{period}} has been generated. Pending invoices were deemed accepted. To correct a rejection, use GSTR-1A.

edu.title: How the Invoice Management System works
edu.what: Suppliers report invoices to GSTN. You must accept, reject, or keep each one pending. Accepted invoices flow into GSTR-2B and earn you ITC; rejected ones do not.
edu.cutoff: GSTR-2B for this period is generated on {{date}}. Act on every invoice before then.
edu.cutoffNoDate: GSTR-2B is generated on the 14th of the following month. Act on every invoice before then.
edu.doingNothing: If you do nothing, the invoice is automatically accepted on the 14th.
edu.rejectPath: Rejected an invoice? The supplier must correct it through a GSTR-1A amendment.

deadline.a11y_one: Automatically accepted in {{count}} day if no action is taken
deadline.a11y_other: Automatically accepted in {{count}} days if no action is taken

keepPending.hint: You still need to accept or reject before the 14th, or it will be deemed accepted.

reject.title: Reject invoice {{invoiceNumber}}?
reject.consequence: ITC for this invoice will not be included in GSTR-2B. The supplier must correct it via a GSTR-1A amendment.
reject.reasonRequired: Please give a reason (at least 3 characters).

bulk.cap: Select up to 100 invoices per action
bulk.noneEligible: No selected invoices are eligible for this action.

empty.neverSynced: Sync to pull your inward invoices from GSTN for {{period}}.

error.alreadySettled: This invoice is already {{status}} and can't be {{action}}. Use GSTR-1A to correct it.

gstr1a.empty: No amendments. Rejected invoices that need supplier correction will appear here.

approval.title: Approve Your ITR
approval.disclaimerPara1: I, the undersigned, do hereby declare that to the best of my knowledge and belief, the information given in this return and the schedules thereto is correct and complete.
approval.disclaimerPara2: I further declare that I am making this return in my capacity as the assessee and I am also competent to make this return and verify it.
approval.disclaimerPara3: I am aware that under Section 277 of the Income Tax Act, 1961, if I make a statement in this return which is incorrect and which I know to be incorrect, or which I do not believe to be true, I am liable to prosecution.
approval.disclaimerPara4: The filing is based on the computation provided by SnapAccount. Final tax liability may vary based on assessment by the Income Tax Department.
approval.disclaimerPara5: By approving this return, you authorise SnapAccount to submit this filing on your behalf to the Income Tax Department of India.
approval.scrollHint: Scroll to the bottom to enable approval
approval.biometricPrompt: Verify your identity to approve ITR filing
approval.biometricFailBody: Could not verify identity. Please try again.
approval.scrollFirstBody: Read the full disclaimer before approving.
approval.verifyFirstBody: Please verify your identity using biometrics or PIN before approving.
approval.errorBody: Could not submit filing for review. Please try again.

hub.title: Business loans

hero.title: Apply for a business loan in minutes

disclaimer.indicativeRates: Interest rates are indicative. Final rate set by the bank after their review.

hub.error: Could not load loan products. Tap to retry.

eligibility.title: Eligibility check
eligibility.step1: Step 1 of 2 · Tell us what you need

consent.softCheck: I consent to a soft eligibility check (no credit bureau pull).

result.subline: {{n}} of {{m}} partner banks may approve you

empty.headline: No banks match today
empty.body: Improve the items above and re-check in 30 days.

eligibility.softCheckInfo: We do not pull your CIBIL/credit-bureau report at this stage. Only your SnapAccount data (GST returns, P&L, bank summary) is analyzed. A bureau pull happens only when you submit a final application and consent on the next screen.

consent.title: Consents
consent.scrollHint: Scroll to the end to enable acceptance

flag.bureau: I, {{name}}, consent to a credit-bureau check on {{dateTime}}.
flag.dataShare: I, {{name}}, consent to share my financial data with the selected bank on {{dateTime}}.
flag.mandate: I, {{name}}, authorize the disbursement mandate to my registered bank account on {{dateTime}}.

bio.prompt: Verify your identity to sign consent

declineModal.title: Decline this consent?
declineModal.body: You can still complete the application later. The application will be paused until all consents are signed.

error.network: Could not record consent. Please retry.

body.bureau: By signing this consent, you authorize SnapAccount and its partner banks to obtain a credit report from licensed credit bureaus (CIBIL, Experian, Equifax) for the purpose of evaluating your loan application. Your data will be retained for 7 years as required by applicable regulations. You may revoke this authorization by contacting SnapAccount Support. This authorization is for credit assessment purposes only.
body.dataShare: By signing this consent, you authorize SnapAccount to compile and transmit your GSTR-3B returns (12 months), Profit & Loss statement, Balance Sheet, KYC documents, and bank statement summary to the selected partner bank. This data will be used solely for credit assessment. The bank will retain this data for a maximum of 7 years and will not use it for marketing or any other purpose.
body.mandate: By signing this consent, you pre-authorize the selected partner bank to credit the approved loan amount to your registered bank account (account ending {{acctMask}}). This mandate is valid for the duration of the loan processing period. You may revoke this mandate before disbursement by contacting SnapAccount Support.

preview.teaser: Your loan package is ready — {{pages}} pages ready to review

error.autoFailed: Auto-document retrieval failed. You may upload manually.

center.title: Privacy & Data

intro.title: Your data, your control.
intro.body: Manage consents, export or correct your data, and reach our Data Protection Officer. Protected under the DPDP Act 2023.

nav.deletionContext: Permanently erase your account and personal data, subject to legal retention (e.g. 7-year financial records).
